captures.alt: A single white ship sprite sitting still near the bottom centre of an otherwise black screen — the static ship from Unit 1.

captures.caption: Holding the joystick up: the ship climbs from the bottom of the screen towards the top, two pixels per frame.
captures.alt: The white ship sprite rising steadily up the black screen while the joystick is held up, then stopping when released.

captures.caption: All four directions: the ship moves right, up, diagonally up-left, then down — pushing two directions at once gives diagonals for free.
captures.alt: The white ship sprite flying around the black screen — right, then up, then diagonally up and to the left, then down — following the joystick.
